title: 3 ‘Greedy' Stocks Making a Killing From Rising Prices
text: Google the word “greedflation,” and you get more than 1.1 million results. Greedy stocks have become a favorite topic for investors.

title: A cereal giant's grumbles about prices could be music to the Fed's ears
text: General Mills the mega manufacturer responsible for your morning bowl of Cheerios, reported a drop in earnings that might make them question if continuing to raise prices is worth it.

title: Is General Mills Stock a Buy After Its 9% Dividend Boost?
text: General Mills' net sales and earnings rose in its fiscal fourth quarter. The company's market-beating payout is sustainable.

title: General Mills' eCommerce Personalization Drives 24% US Digital Sales Bump
text: As grocery brands and retailers alike look to improve their data capabilities to drive digital sales, General Mills has made eCommerce gains by improving its analytics.

title: Markets Flat Midday After Fed Chair Powell Suggests Rate Hikes Might Not be Over
text: U.S. equities were flat at midday on June 28, 2023 after Fed Chair Jerome Powell's latest commentary on monetary policy suggested the Fed might not be done raising rates to curb inflation.

title: General Mills Shares Slide After Profit, Sales Miss as Price Hikes Dent Demand
text: General Mills shares tumbled close to 5% in early trading on Wednesday after the company reported weaker-than-expected profit and sales as prices rose and shoppers pulled back.

title: General Mills (GIS) Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: General Mills' (GIS) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect improved earnings and sales, with net price realization being a driver. Management announces a dividend hike.

title: General Mills stock falls on 4Q sales miss; profit slides
text: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) Inc shares slipped 5% to $76.68 in early Wednesday trading as the parent company of brands such as Cheerios and Pillsbury reported fourth-quarter 2023 revenue that rose 3% year over year to $5.030 billion, but fell short of the $5.177 billion FactSet consensus. General Mills attributed the sales increase to “positive organic net price realization and mix,” although its 4Q gross margin fell 189 basis points to 34.4% of sales, due to higher input costs and unfavorable mark-to-market effects, which were partially offset by higher pricing.

title: General Mills Retreats To The Buy Zone
text: General Mills NYSE: GIS retreated following the Q4 results and guidance marking an opportune time to buy the stock. The retreat is due to mixed results and guidance that left investors wanting more, but there is a bigger story.

title: General Mills (GIS) Q4 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: General Mills (GIS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.12 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.05 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.12 per share a year ago.

title: General Mills' stock slides 4% as profit falls sharply and sales miss consensus in latest quarter
text: General Mills Inc.'s stock GIS, -1.17% slid 4% premarket Wednesday, after the parent of brands including Cheerios, Nature Valley, Blue Buffalo pet products and Pillsbury, posted a steep decline in profit and weaker-than-expected sales for its fiscal fourth quarter. The company had net income of $614.9 million, or $1.03 a share, for the quarter to May 28, down from $822.8 million, or $1.35 a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: General Mills Reports Fiscal 2023 Fourth-quarter and Full-year Results and Provides Fiscal 2024 Outlook

title: Q2 profits are set for their biggest drop since the pandemic, but then the worst may be over for the year
text: Wall Street is expecting a third straight quarter of falling profits and the worst decrease since the pandemic in 2020, when second quarter earnings are reported in July, but that may be the bottom for this year.

title: General Mills (GIS) Gears Up for Q4 Earnings: Things to Note
text: General Mills' (GIS) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 results are likely to reflect gains from the Accelerate strategy amid cost inflation.

title: 4 Consumer Staple Stocks to Buy Amid Ongoing Market Volatility
text: Although inflation has slowed and the Fed has halted interest rate hikes, the crisis is far from over. Consumer stocks like Conagra Brands (CAG), Krispy Kreme (DNUT), Ingredion Incorporated (INGR) and General Mills (GIS) will be safe bets.

title: Dividend Income Update May 2023
text: Without rehashing the wild ride we experienced in the market so far in 2023, I could find comfort in one thing, my dividends. Hitting the elusive four-digit mark in May has been a welcome sign for me on my dividend growth journey. In May 2022 I brought in $862.43 and this May I have seen a year over year increase of 23.8%.

title: Will General Mills (GIS) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: General Mills (GIS) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: General Mills (GIS) Loses -10.24% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
text: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for General Mills (GIS) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

title: General Mills Stock's Extended Slump Could Soon Be Over
text: General Mills Inc (NYSE:GIS) stock just pulled back on the charts following its May 15 record peak of $90.89, though the $80 level appears to be swooping in as support.

title: General Mills: A Decent Year, But Seems Overpriced
text: General Mills had a decent year with its share price up more than 20% over the last 12 months. Analysts are decidedly neutral on General Mills. On certain price metrics, it seems overpriced.
